attributes.description: CRISIL Ltd is a globally diversified analytical Company providing ratings, research, risk and policy advisory services. CRISIL is India’s leading ratings agency and the foremost provider of high-end research to large banks and leading corporations.[1]

CRISIL Ltd is a globally diversified analytical Company providing ratings, research, risk and policy advisory services. CRISIL is India’s leading ratings agency and the foremost provider of high-end research to large banks and leading corporations.[1]
